content: Phase 2: Fix image upload pipeline (formidable limits, fileToDataUri, HEIF handling)
Phase 2: Fix video upload pipeline (cloud offload for >3.2MB, HEVC preview)
Phase 2: Fix i18n - ensure no raw keys appear in UI
Phase 2: Fix Vercel deploy (dependency conflicts, symlink/pattern)
Phase 2: Fix additional issues found during code review
Phase 3: End-to-end testing using testing agent
